text:

#0  sched_switch (td=0xfffff80003519000, newtd=0xfffff800032ffa00, flags=<value optimized out>) at /usr/src/sys/kern/sched_ule.c:1973
1973			cpuid = PCPU_GET(cpuid);
(kgdb) l *(msdosfs_mount+0x10f6)
0xffffffff8098e8f6 is in msdosfs_mount (/usr/src/sys/fs/msdosfs/msdosfs_vfsops.c:730).
725	
726		/*
727		 * Have the inuse map filled in.
728		 */
729		MSDOSFS_LOCK_MP(pmp);
730		error = fillinusemap(pmp);
731		MSDOSFS_UNLOCK_MP(pmp);
732		if (error != 0)
733			goto error_exit;
734	
Current language:  auto; currently minimal
(kgdb)
